description: Generated resolution-email drafts produced by the Resolution Drafter Agent. One row per drafted email. disputeId references Disputes.Id (the dispute the agent drafted a reply for). Many drafts may share one disputeId (re-runs, baseline vs. memory-on, A/B tests). evalName is denormalized from Disputes.evalName for eval-mode tracking; NULL for production runs.

fields.description: FK -> Disputes.Id (UUID-as-string). Required so drafts cannot be orphaned.
Denormalized from Disputes.evalName. NULL for production runs.
Orchestrator job key for the agent run that produced this draft. Used to resolve the trace for feedback.
Distributed trace ID for the agent run. Often equal to jobKey on UiPath.
Has a human reviewer signed off on this draft? Flipped to true by the coded feedback app.
Drafted email body, greeting through sign-off.
